scripts.start:backend: echo '[INFO] Demarrage du backend (http://localhost:3000)' && npm --prefix backend run start:dev
scripts.start:frontend: echo '[INFO] Demarrage du frontend (http://localhost:5173)' && npm --prefix frontend run dev
scripts.start:all: sh -c "echo '[INFO] Demarrage de toute la stack...'; npm run start:backend & npm run start:frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
